questions.question: Question count: 41 Note: Best-effort structured extraction from a column-formatted source PDF. Where the source itself marked an answer as changed, that note is preserved.

Q1. (2025) Consider the following statements in respect of the Kho Kho World Cup: [2025] I. The event was held in Delhi, India. II. Indian men beat Nepal with a score of 78-40 in the final to become the World Champion in men category. III. Indian women beat Nepal with a score of 54-36 in the final to become the World Champion in women category. Which of the statements given above is/are correct? Source ref: gk_part1 / Q1

Q2. (2025) Consider the following statements: [2025] I. In the finals of the 45th Chess Olympiad held in 2024, Gukesh Dommaraju became the world's youngest winner after defeating the Russian player Ian Nepomniachtchi. II. Abhimanyu Mishra, an American chess player, holds the record of becoming world's youngest ever Grandmaster. Which of the statements given above is/are correct? Source ref: gk_part1 / Q4

Q3. (2023) Consider following statements: [2023] Statement-I: Israel has established diplomatic relations with some Arab States. Statement-II: The Arab Peace Initiative' mediated by Saudi Arabia was signed by Israel and Arab League. Which one of the following is correct in respect of the above statements? Source ref: gk_part1 / Q16

options.A: Both Statement-I and Statement-II are correct and Statement-II is the correct explanation for Statement- I
options.B: Both Statement-I and Statement-II are correct and Statement-II is not the correct explanation for Statement-I
options.C: Statement-1 is correct but Statement-II is incorrect
options.D: Statement-I is incorrect but Statement-II is correct

questions.question: Q4. (2023) Consider the following pairs with regard to sports awards: [2023] 1. Major Dhyan Chand Khel Ratna Award: For the most spectacular and outstanding performance by a sportsperson over period of last four years 2. Arjuna Award: For the lifetime achievement by a sportsperson 3. Dronacharya Award: To honour eminent coaches who have successfully trained sportspersons or teams 4. Rashtriya Khel Protsahan Puraskar: To recognize the contribution made by sportspersons even after their retirement How many of the above pairs are correctly matched? Source ref: gk_part1 / Q17

Q5. (2023) Consider the following statements in respect of the 44th Chess Olympiad, 2022: [2023] 1. It was the first time that Chess Olympiad was held in India. 2. The official mascot was named Thambi'. 3. The trophy for the winning team in the open section is the Vera Menchik Cup. 4. The trophy for the winning team in the women's section is the Hamilton-Russell Cup. How many of the statements given above are correct? Source ref: gk_part1 / Q18

Q6. (2021) Consider the following statements in respect of the Laureus World Sports Award which was instituted in the year 2000: [2021] 1) American golfer Tiger Woods was the first winner of this award. 2) The award was received mostly by ‘Formula One’ players so far. 3) Roger Federer received this award maximum number of times compared to others. Which of the above statements are correct? Source ref: gk_part1 / Q29

Q7. Which of the above statements is/are correct? Source ref: gk_part1 / Q30

Q27. (2006) What is Medecins Sans Frontieres (MSF)? [2006] Source ref: gk_part3 / Q35

options.A: An agency formed by the International Olympic Committee (IOC) to check misuse of drugs by sports persons
options.B: A non-governmental organization which specialized in international humanitarian aid and emergency medical assistance.
options.C: An organization to develop applications of nanotechnology in medicine
options.D: An organization of medical practitioners funded by the European Union which carries out research against spread of AIDS

questions.question: Q33. (2005) Consider the following statements concerning the Indian Railways.: [2005] 1. The Head Quarters of the North Western Railway are located at Jodhpur. 2. ‘Indrail pass’ - a travel-as-you- please ticket has been created especially for freedom and sports persons who have represented India in any game/sport. 3. Fairy Queen is a train using the world’s oldest working engine and the Indian railways conduct a journey of wildlife and heritage sites on it. Which of the above statements is/are correct? Source ref: gk_part3 / Q83

questions.question: Q38. (1999) In order to win the Grand Slam in Tennis, a player must win which one of the following groups of tournaments? [1999] Source ref: gk_part4 / Q14

options.A: Australian Open, Wimbledon, French Open, US Open
options.C: Wimbledon, French Open, Paegas Czech Open, US Open

questions.question: Q41. (1996) Consider the following statements: Towards the close of 1995, the fortunes of Indian Hockey were believed to be on the upswing because: [1996] I. India had won the Azlan Shah Cup in ‘95’. II. India beat Pakistan in the South Asian Federation games final. Source ref: gk_part4 / Q51

options.B: I, II and III are correct
options.C: I, II and IV are correct
